Industrial Sealing Portfolio
Products

Explore CHX product families through a structured catalog built around sealing function, hydraulic application, rotary sealing, engineered solutions, and industrial support parts.

创鸿信产品体系 CHX Product System

面向设备制造、液压系统、旋转密封与定制需求的工业密封产品体系 Industrial Sealing Products for Equipment,
Hydraulic, Rotary, and Custom Applications

创鸿信提供密封圈、液压密封件、油封、工程密封件及相关工业配件，服务于设备制造、维修保养和备件替换等多类工业需求。 CHX supplies a broad range of sealing rings, hydraulic seals, oil seals,
engineered sealing components, and related industrial parts for equipment manufacturing, maintenance, and replacement needs.

Category Index

01
密封圈类 Sealing Rings

Core ring-type sealing solutions for static sealing, fitting joints, low-friction motion, and maintenance replacement needs.

Product Count 7

02
液压密封件 Hydraulic Seals

Developed for hydraulic cylinders and reciprocating systems with attention to pressure resistance, wear life, and sealing reliability.

Product Count 6

03
油封类 Oil Seals

Focused on rotary shafts, drivetrain systems, and automotive applications with dependable leak control and contamination protection.

Product Count 6

04
工程密封件 Engineered Seals

High-performance sealing solutions for low friction, precision motion, and demanding pressure or chemical environments.

Product Count 5

05
工业配件 / 其他 Industrial Parts

Complementary industrial parts for transmission, vibration absorption, maintenance replacement, and custom rubber support needs.

Product Count 4

01

密封圈类 Sealing Rings

Core ring-type sealing solutions for static sealing, fitting joints, low-friction motion, and maintenance replacement needs.

Product Count

7

Sealing Rings

O型圈 O-Ring

A widely used basic sealing element suitable for static sealing and selected dynamic sealing conditions.

View Details →

Sealing Rings

X型圈 X-Ring

A four-lobe sealing profile that improves stability and reduces rolling in dynamic applications.

View Details →

Sealing Rings

ED圈 ED Ring

Designed for threaded fittings and hydraulic joints to achieve reliable pressure sealing performance.

View Details →

Sealing Rings

组合密封圈 Composite Seal Ring

Combines multiple sealing materials or lips to improve assembly stability and media isolation.

View Details →

Sealing Rings

泛塞封 Spring Seal

A spring-energized seal for low friction, chemical resistance, and demanding dynamic conditions.

View Details →

Sealing Rings

PTFE密封圈 PTFE Seal Ring

Offers low friction and strong media compatibility for aggressive fluids and clean applications.

View Details →

Sealing Rings

O型圈套装 / 修理盒 O-Ring Kits / Repair Box

A maintenance-friendly assortment for fast size selection and on-site replacement work.

View Details →

02

液压密封件 Hydraulic Seals

Developed for hydraulic cylinders and reciprocating systems with attention to pressure resistance, wear life, and sealing reliability.

Product Count

6

Hydraulic Seals

U型密封 U-Cup

Commonly used in hydraulic cylinder systems with strong pressure sealing and stable service life.

View Details →

Hydraulic Seals

UN / UH / DH 系列 UN / UH / DH Series

Standard hydraulic seal profiles suitable for common reciprocating sealing groove requirements.

View Details →

Hydraulic Seals

活塞密封 Piston Seal

Designed to isolate pressure chambers efficiently inside cylinders and hydraulic assemblies.

View Details →

Hydraulic Seals

杆密封 Rod Seal

Installed on piston rods to control media leakage under reciprocating movement.

View Details →

Hydraulic Seals

防尘密封 Wiper / Dust Seal

Protects hydraulic systems by blocking dust, mud, and contaminants from entering the cylinder.

View Details →

Hydraulic Seals

PDU / PDI / PSD 系列 PDU / PDI / PSD Series

Compact hydraulic sealing profiles for different groove standards and assembly structures.

View Details →

03

油封类 Oil Seals

Focused on rotary shafts, drivetrain systems, and automotive applications with dependable leak control and contamination protection.

Product Count

6

Oil Seals

TC骨架油封 TC Oil Seal

A standard rotary shaft sealing solution widely used in automotive and industrial rotating equipment.

View Details →

Oil Seals

VA / VS 水封 VA / VS Water Seal

Suitable for water protection and splash sealing where axial lip contact is required.

View Details →

Oil Seals

汽车油封 Automotive Oil Seal

Built for engines, transmissions, and wheel-end systems under automotive operating conditions.

View Details →

Oil Seals

方向机油封 Steering Gear Oil Seal

Specialized for steering systems requiring stable leakage control and durable rotary sealing.

View Details →

Oil Seals

INA油封 INA Oil Seal

Used in transmission and precision rotary assemblies requiring consistent shaft sealing quality.

View Details →

Oil Seals

组合油封 Combined Oil Seal

An integrated sealing structure for compact layouts and multiple sealing functions in one assembly.

View Details →

Engineered Seals

格莱圈 Glyd Ring

A low-friction sealing solution used in precision hydraulic piston and rod applications.

View Details →

Engineered Seals

斯特封 Step Seal

Provides efficient reciprocating sealing where wear resistance and service stability are important.

View Details →

Engineered Seals

导向带 / 耐磨带 Guide Ring / Wear Ring

Supports guiding and anti-extrusion performance while protecting metallic mating surfaces.

View Details →

Engineered Seals

PTFE复合密封 PTFE Composite Seal

Combines PTFE sliding performance with elastic energizing for harsh media and demanding speeds.

View Details →

Engineered Seals

高性能组合密封 High-Performance Composite Seal

Engineered for demanding pressure, speed, and chemical conditions in advanced industrial equipment.
